raw:
Scene: green_can, blue_wrapper, white_bottle, table
Step 1: reach(white_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the white bottle
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_bottle, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_bottle) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(white_bottle)
  affordance_region: the neck of the white bottle
  contact: holding(white_bottle) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(white_bottle)
Step 3: transport(white_bottle -> upright_position)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table near the upright position
  spatial: above(white_bottle, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(white_bottle)
  done_when: above(white_bottle, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(white_bottle -> upright_position)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table near the upright position
  contact: surface_contact(white_bottle, table) [completion]; released(white_bottle) [completion]
  pose: upright(white_bottle) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(white_bottle, table) AND released(white_bottle) AND upright(white_bottle)
<END_OF_PLAN>
